id.description: Explicit conversation id; the backend assigns one when `None`.

owner.description: Owner to stamp onto the new conversation's meta.

project_root.description: Absolute project root path of the calling CLI/daemon.

visibility.description: Initial visibility for the new conversation.

Visibility.description:
Visibility of a conversation. Controls whether [`ConversationListRequest::as_user`]
filtering surfaces it to users other than its `owner`.

oneOf.description:
Visible only to the conversation's `owner` (and to unscoped/admin
queries that pass no `as_user`). The default.
Visible to every user, in addition to its owner.
